narrative:
North Olmsted-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 991 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.4 percentage points.
